response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Docker, Git) and demonstrates deep expertise in backend architecture, testing, and AI-agent infrastructure. His open-source contributions, cross-stack adaptability, and proven track record in enterprise-scale systems make him an exceptional fit, despite limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest — which are learnable given his proficiency in equivalent technologies.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React across enterprise environments
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP frameworks
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though equivalent frameworks (Express, Jest) are used
German language skill is only basic, which may limit collaboration in a Berlin-based German-speaking team
Some roles involve DLang and legacy stacks; need to confirm recent focus remains on modern TS/Node ecosystem
